$comment: AI Tagger Universe -> LOCAL Ollama. Keys verified against src/core/settings.ts. Only the keys that differ from the plugin's own defaults are set here; everything else is merged from DEFAULT_SETTINGS on load. IMPORTANT: the local endpoint must be Ollama's OpenAI-COMPATIBLE path (/v1/chat/completions), NOT the native /api path — the plugin posts OpenAI-style requests. Tags are always written to YAML frontmatter (the plugin has no inline-tag mode). Requires: ollama pull llama3.1:8b
